requirements: Treat every charge/refund as a transactional, idempotent operation keyed by an idempotency id.
Store amounts in minor units (cents) using integer/decimal types; never float.
Persist provider event ids and verify webhook signatures before processing.
Make payment webhooks safe to re-run; deduplicate on event id.
Record audit trail of every state transition for invoices/orders/subscriptions.
Add tests for success, failure, retry, and webhook replay paths.
security: never log full card numbers, CVV, or raw bank account details
verify webhook signature with the provider secret
scope api keys per environment and rotate them
performance: process webhooks asynchronously; respond fast and queue the work
do not block user requests on slow provider calls
verify: run unit and integration tests for changed payment files
replay a sample webhook event end-to-end in a sandbox
